changelog: 🔧 CRITICAL FIX: Puzzle generation failure resolved
FIXED: Aggressive fallback now ensures puzzles always generate
FIXED: Fallback triggers at 50% of target (was 60%)
FIXED: Fallback removes cells up to full target (not just minimum)
OPTIMIZED: Timeout increased to 2000ms for better accuracy
OPTIMIZED: Reduced target cells - Easy:32, Medium:42, Hard:50, Expert:56
IMPROVED: Better balance between speed and puzzle quality
No more 'Failed to generate puzzle' errors!
impact: Game now always generates playable puzzles
